steps.title: Identify the organizing pattern
steps.content: The passage opens by announcing Julius was “very useful,” then systematically lists different specific areas of knowledge and skill. This pattern—claim followed by enumeration—is the text's defining structure.

steps.title: Evaluate the choices
steps.content:
Choice D correctly names the purpose: explaining different ways Julius was helpful.

The passage supports this by systematically listing his specific domains—neighborhood knowledge, roads, soils, hunting/fishing locations, horse/dog management.

The alternatives fail: A and C introduce content not in the passage (comparisons, shared activities), while B narrows the focus wrongly to just soil.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
